title: HIV/HEPATITIS C TESTING - 211info
text: LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV/HEPATITIS C TESTING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers testing for HIV and Hepatitis C, as well as a syringe exchange services. Site offers distribution of condoms and first aid supplies. Female condoms available upon request. 255 SW Coast Highway Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies; By appointment only Email (541) 265-0404 ... Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 265-0404 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Hepatitis Testing HIV Testing Needle Exchange and Injection Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
